schemaVersion.name: Schema Version
schemaVersion.hint: The current version of the data related to this module.

enableAmmoSystem.name: Enable Ammunition System
enableAmmoSystem.hint: Choose whther to enable the custom ammunition system.

postActionToChat.name: Post Actions to Chat
postActionToChat.hint: When running macros that simulate taking actions, post either a simple message or the full action to chat.

postAmmoToChat.name: Post Ammunition to Chat
postAmmoToChat.hint: When firing a weapon that requires ammunition, post either a simple message or the whole ammunition item.

preventFiringUnloaded.name: Prevent Firing Unloaded Weapons
preventFiringUnloaded.hint: For weapons with a reload of at least 1, prevent attack rolls using that weapon unless you have the loaded effect.

advancedAmmoSystemPlayer.name: Advanced Ammo System
advancedAmmoSystemPlayer.hint: PCs: Track loaded ammunition for reloadable and repeating weapons. Overrides "Prevent Firing Unloaded Weapons".

advancedThrownWeaponSystem.name: Advanced Thrown Weapon System
advancedThrownWeaponSystem.hint: PCs: Handle thrown weapons being dropped after us, and require another weapon to be drawn before another attack.

requiredPermissionToShowMessage.name: Minimum Permission to See Messages
requiredPermissionToShowMessage.hint: Seeral functions of this module send messages to chat. Set the minimum permission that sees the messages.

hideTokenIcons.name: Hide Token Effect Icons
hideTokenIcons.hint: Hide the token icons for effects created by this module.

action.switch: Select which ammunition to switch to

enable.name: Enable Ammunition Effect
enable.hint: Override the system's ammunition effects with one that uses the previously-fired ammunition effect.

warningLevel.name: Ammunition Effect Warning Level
warningLevel.hint: The level of warning to show when ammunition effects may not apply as expected.

notMatched.verbose: Your weapon's current ammunition does not match the ammunition whose effect is applied to the roll. The ammunition may have change since the attack roll you are trying to roll damage from was generated.
notMatched.simple: Weapon ammunition does not match ammunition effect.

damageWithoutEffect.verbose: Your weapon's current ammunition has an effect, but it was not applied to this damage roll. The ammunition may have changed since the attack roll you are trying to roll from was generated, or you are trying to roll damage without a prior attack roll.
damageWithoutEffect.simple: Weapon damage rolled without ammunition effect.

consolidateAmmo.infoAlreadyConsolidated: Your repeating ammunition is already consolidated.

nextChamber.noCapacityWeapons: You have no weapons with the capacity trait
nextChamber.warningAlreadyLoaded: {weapon} already has a chamber loaded with {ammuntion} selected.
nextChamber.chatMessageSelectChamber: {token} selects a chamber loaded with {ammunition} on their {weapon}.
nextChamber.chatMessageSelectNextChamber: {token} selects the next loaded chamber on their {weapon}.

utils.singleCharacterSelected: You must have a single character selected.
utils.warningDialog1: You cannot perform this action because:
utils.warningDialog2: This is a creature of the PF2e Vessaya module.
utils.warningDialog3: You can learning how to use the module... etc.

settings.hint: When using Fake Out action, the DC to roll against.

feat.name: Fake Out
feat.noWeapon: {actor} is not wielding a loaded firearm or crossbow.
feat.noTarget: You must have a target selected.

result.success: You grant your ally a +{bonus} circumstance bonus to their attack.
result.failure: You fail to aid your ally.
result.ciricitalFailure: Your ally takes a -1 circumstance penalty to their check.
